verdict: Clarisonic's 9200 reviews (4.2★) represent longest market tenure and brand trust; the oscillating brush is proven to enhance ingredient penetration. However, the brand was discontinued in 2021, raising longevity concerns.

_research.name: Clarisonic Mia 2 Facial Cleansing Brush
_research.con: Discontinued product means no warranty support or replacement parts available long-term.
